content.benchmark: M31 -- cross-model complementarity A/B: Fable 5 vs GPT-5.6-sol vs union, blind cross-model panel judge

systems.desc: Claude Fable 5 via claude CLI (stream-json interactive, model claude-fable-5), fresh process per file, cwd pinned to corpus
OpenAI GPT-5.6-sol via codex exec --json (model gpt-5.6-sol, sandbox read-only), fresh process per file, cwd pinned to corpus
derived arm C: concatenation of fable5 + gpt56sol findings, deduplicated on (file, line)

judging.panel: each claim judged independently by BOTH claude-fable-5 and gpt-5.6-sol (sealeval.judge, provenance stripped, refute-by-default, fresh process per claim)
judging.confirmed: a claim is CONFIRMED only if BOTH panelists return GENUINE_BUG
judging.self_preference_control: symmetric cross-vendor panel + provenance stripping; both arms face the same two judges

metrics.TP: CONFIRMED (both judges GENUINE_BUG) AND claim matches a sealed injection (same file, |line-line_key| <= 1)
metrics.precision: TP / all claims of the arm (hallucinated/out-of-scope files count against precision)
metrics.recall: distinct injections matched by a TP / total injections
metrics.complementarity: caught(X)\caught(Y) on distinct injection ids matched by TPs
metrics.judge_disagreement_rate: share of claims where the two panelists disagree (diagnostic only, no decision weight)

decision_rule.GO: H2 true -> two-barrel (crossgate) routing has measured value; proceed to productized gate measurement
decision_rule.KILL: recall(union) - max(solo recalls) < 0.05 OR precision(union) < 0.40 -> union adds noise, not coverage; single-best-model routing stands
decision_rule.otherwise: INCONCLUSIVE -> no build; may only raise a new sealed A/B

content.prior_note: run1 (seed 20260707, Sonnet-tier claude): codex 0.75 recall / 0.62 precision, claude 0.33/0.47. M31 upgrades the claude arm to Fable 5; fresh seed => fresh injection set, fresh CLI process per call => no cross-run contamination.
content.cost_accounting: both arms subscription-backed CLIs; report CLI call counts + wall time per arm (no per-dollar claim pre-registered)
